_comment: Accessibility runner configuration for Pa11y on Sophie's Escape.
chromeLaunchConfig.args disables Chromium's sandbox so Pa11y can
launch on the GitHub-hosted Ubuntu 24.04 runner, which restricts
unprivileged user namespaces (the same constraint addressed in the
hideElements: two aria-hidden canvas overlay elements are excluded
from Pa11y's scan. Pa11y cannot compute contrast ratios when a
semi-transparent background sits on top of a WebGL canvas, which
produces spurious NaN:1 contrast failures. Both elements are
aria-hidden='true' and are outside the accessibility tree.
Do not remove these entries without updating SE-002.
Do not add further ignore entries here without a matching record in
docs/accessibility.md or a project exception under docs/exceptions/.
